content.text: Good morning! I'm Sunny the Squirrel — the forest's most organized morning expert!
content.name: Sunny the Squirrel

content.text: Every day when I wake up, I stretch my tail, wash my face, and tidy up my fur before I go searching for nuts.
content.name: Sunny the Squirrel

content.text: But today I rushed out too quickly… and a bird told me I had leaves stuck on my head! How embarrassing!
content.name: Sunny the Squirrel

content.text: So now I always check myself in a shiny puddle before going anywhere. It helps me feel confident and ready!
content.name: Sunny the Squirrel

content.text: Speaking of getting ready… I have a question for you!
content.name: Sunny the Squirrel

content.text: Hey there! I'm Lila the Llama — and guess what? I just made a new friend today!
content.name: Lila the Llama

content.text: Her name is Tilly the Turtle, and at first I wasn't sure if we'd get along… I mean, I'm super energetic and she's really slow.
content.name: Lila the Llama

content.text: But then we found out we BOTH love painting colorful rocks! We spent the whole afternoon decorating pebbles together.
content.name: Lila the Llama

content.text: It's funny how just one shared hobby can make two completely different animals become good friends!
content.name: Lila the Llama

content.text: Let me ask you something about friendships!
content.name: Lila the Llama

content.text: Hi there! I'm Momo the Mouse — tiny, speedy, and super good at keeping my little mouse home tidy!
content.name: Momo the Mouse

content.text: Every morning, I sweep up cookie crumbs, fluff my bedding, and fold my teensy clothes. It keeps my burrow cozy!
content.name: Momo the Mouse

content.text: My friend Benny the Beaver visited once and said, 'Momo, how do you keep everything so clean?'
content.name: Momo the Mouse

content.text: I told him it's just about doing little tasks every day so my home stays nice!
content.name: Momo the Mouse

content.text: Now, let me ask you something about taking care of your home!
content.name: Momo the Mouse

content.text: Hello friend! I'm Otto the Owl. I like quiet places where I can relax, read, or take care of myself.
content.name: Otto the Owl

content.text: Sometimes I need a private place to brush my feathers or practice my self-care routine.
content.name: Otto the Owl

content.text: Once I tried doing it in the busy forest clearing… big mistake! Everyone kept walking by and staring.
content.name: Otto the Owl

content.text: Now I always choose a safe and private spot where I won’t be interrupted.
content.name: Otto the Owl

content.text: Let me ask you something about finding the right private place!
content.name: Otto the Owl

content.text: Hi! I'm Poppy the Penguin. I love my cozy igloo because it's my private place!
content.name: Poppy the Penguin

content.text: When I want quiet time or need to take care of myself, I slip inside and close the snow door.
content.name: Poppy the Penguin

content.text: It’s important to have a space where you can be alone and not be disturbed.
content.name: Poppy the Penguin

content.text: Some things are meant to stay private — and that’s totally okay!
content.name: Poppy the Penguin

content.text: Let me check if you know about private spaces too!
content.name: Poppy the Penguin

content.text: Hey there! I’m Coco the Cat — master of knowing when to be social and when to have private time.
content.name: Coco the Cat

content.text: When guests come over, I walk proudly into the living room to say hello. I love the attention!
content.name: Coco the Cat

content.text: But when I need to change into my comfy pajamas or do something private… I head straight to my room and close the door.
content.name: Coco the Cat

content.text: Different activities belong in different places — some public, some private.
content.name: Coco the Cat

content.text: Let’s see if you can sort a few activities too!
content.name: Coco the Cat

content.text: Hey there! I'm Felix the Fox — the neighborhood safety expert!
content.name: Felix the Fox

content.text: Yesterday, my friend Rabbit asked me for help because he tore open a snack bag with his teeth and ended up spilling everything!
content.name: Felix the Fox

content.text: I told him, 'You have to be careful with delicate things! Sometimes teeth can damage stuff you're trying to open.'
content.name: Felix the Fox

content.text: It's the same with other items too — if something is sensitive, you need to open it gently with your hands, not your teeth.
content.name: Felix the Fox

content.text: Let me see if you know how to handle something carefully!
content.name: Felix the Fox

content.text: Hello! I'm Dr. Pebble the Penguin — the coolest science teacher in the Arctic!
content.name: Dr. Pebble

content.text: Today, my students and I explored how different body parts have different jobs.
content.name: Dr. Pebble

content.text: Some parts help us grow, some help us breathe, and others help our bodies make special cells.
content.name: Dr. Pebble

content.text: I told my class, 'Just like tools in a toolbox, every body part has its own purpose!'
content.name: Dr. Pebble

content.text: Now I'm curious — can you match these body parts with the job they do?
content.name: Dr. Pebble

content.text: Hi friend! I'm Luna the Lioness — and today I helped my cubs with their biology homework!
content.name: Luna the Lioness

content.text: We were learning about how new life begins and how different parts of the body work together.
content.name: Luna the Lioness

content.text: My cubs asked, 'Where do sperm come from? Where do eggs travel? How do babies start growing?'
content.name: Luna the Lioness

content.text: I explained that each part of the body has a special role — just like how each lion in the pride has their own job!
content.name: Luna the Lioness

content.text: Think you can fill in the blanks about how this process works?
content.name: Luna the Lioness
